allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''Name:'''', d.get\(''''name''''\)\); print\(''''Full name:'''', d.get\(''''full_name''''\)\); print\(''''Description:'''', d.get\(''''description''''\)\); print\(''''Clone URL:'''', d.get\(''''clone_url''''\)\); print\(''''Stars:'''', d.get\(''''stargazers_count''''\)\); print\(''''Language:'''', d.get\(''''language''''\)\); print\(''''Topics:'''', d.get\(''''topics''''\)\)")
